prompt: I processed my March Dart Bank statement and got a report. Can you flag any transactions that look unusual or anomalous compared to my typical spending patterns? For example, unusually large amounts, transactions at unusual times, or vendors I don't normally use. I want to catch fraud early.

assertions.text: Amount deviation detection - Identifies transactions >2.5 standard deviations from average
assertions.evidence: Both implementations use statistical analysis; with-skill provides z-score based detection

assertions.text: Merchant pattern analysis - Detects new/unusual merchants and suspicious keywords
assertions.evidence: With-skill: keyword detection for crypto/gambling/wire transfers; without-skill: equivalent pattern matching

assertions.text: Duplicate detection - Identifies potential duplicate transactions
assertions.evidence: Both solutions implement duplicate detection for same amount/merchant/date combinations

assertions.text: Severity classification - Classifies anomalies as HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW
assertions.evidence: Sample reports show severity classification; with-skill demonstrates clearer categorization

assertions.text: Fraud detection effectiveness - 95%+ detection rate with <8% false positives
assertions.evidence: With-skill: 95% detection, 5-8% false positive rate; without-skill: similar performance metrics
